zh.lifeSummary: 當John Trowbridge於1510年出生在英國薩默塞特赫頓時，他的父親Thomas Trowbridge28歲，母親Lady Anne Danvers19歲。他於1532年與Catherine Prouse在英國英格蘭戴文哈福德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1575年2月15日在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特赫頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Trowbridge于1510年出生在英国薩默塞特赫頓时，他的父亲Thomas Trowbridge28岁，母亲Lady Anne Danvers19岁。他于1532年与Catherine Prouse在英国英格兰戴文哈福德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1575年2月15日在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特赫頓。

nameMeanings.name: Trowbridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Dorset, Wiltshire and Hampshire): habitational name from Trowbridge in Wiltshire, named from Old English trēow ‘tree’ + brycg ‘bridge’; the name probably referred to a felled trunk serving as a rough-and-ready bridge.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Trowbridge was born in 1510, in Hutton, Somerset, England, his father, Thomas Trowbridge, was 28 and his mother, Lady Anne Danvers, was 19. He married Catherine Prouse in 1532, in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 15 February 1575, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Hutton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Trowbridge est né en 1510, à Hutton, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Trowbridge, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Danvers, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Prouse en 1532, à Chagford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 15 février 1575, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Hutton, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Trowbridge 1510 in Hutton, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Trowbridge 28 und seine Mutter Lady Anne Danvers 19. Er hat 1532 in Chagford, Devon, England, United Kingdom Catherine Prouse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 15. Februar 1575 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Hutton, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Trowbridge è nato il nel 1510 nel Hutton, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Thomas Trowbridge, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Lady Anne Danvers, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Prouse nel 1532, nel Chagford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 15 febbraio 1575, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Hutton, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Trowbridgeが1510年にイギリスソメルセトハットオンで生まれた時，父Thomas Trowbridgeは28歳，母Lady Anne Danversは19歳であった。1532年にイギリスイギリスデボンチャグフォードでCatherine Prouseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1575年2月15日に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトハットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Trowbridge(이)가 1510년 영국 서머세트 후턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Trowbridge(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Anne Danvers(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1532년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 차그퍼드에서 Catherine Prouse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1575년 2월 15일 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 후턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Trowbridge nasceu em 1510, em Hutton, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Trowbridge, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Danvers, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Prouse em 1532, em Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 15 de fevereiro de 1575, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Hutton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Trowbridge родился в 1510 г. в местности хуттон, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Trowbridge было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Danvers, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Prouse в 1532 г. в местности чагфорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 15 февраля 1575 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности хуттон, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Trowbridge nació en 1510, en Hutton, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Trowbridge, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Danvers, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Catherine Prouse en 1532, en Chagford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 15 de febrero de 1575, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Hutton, Somerset, Inglaterra.
